name: COPUS KOREA Co.,Ltd.
summary: COPUS KOREA Co., Ltd. engages in the drama and movie production. It produces subtitles, provides subtitle production services, and invests in feature films. The company also provides app for fan support, content community, and commerce tool. In addition, it engages in commerce business, including distributing cosmetics via e-commerce platforms and motar stores of local retail channels. The company is based in Seoul, South Korea.
